physical_therapy.prior_function: Ambulated with rolling walker in apartment; needed standby assist for bathing and stairs
physical_therapy.current_mobility: Ambulated 25 feet with front-wheeled walker and moderate assist; slow cadence, requires rest breaks
physical_therapy.weight_bearing: Partial weight bearing right lower extremity per orthopedic protocol
physical_therapy.recommendation: Skilled nursing facility for continued PT; not safe for home discharge given slow progress, limited caregiver availability, and medical complexity
goals: Ambulate 75 feet with walker and minimal assist
Safe transfers bed-chair-toilet with assistive device

occupational_therapy.adl_status: Requires moderate assist for toileting and lower-body dressing; setup for upper-body ADLs
occupational_therapy.home_safety: Lives alone on second floor without elevator; son unable to provide daily caregiving. SNF recommended for safe recovery environment.
